description: Per-tier hard budget caps for the Test Suite v2. Enforced by scripts/testing-v2/assert-budget.mjs. Wall is read from runner JSON reports; CPU is measured directly from the whole-run process tree (see docs/testing-v2/design.md §6/§6.1). Tier CPU caps intentionally sum to the full cap (7.5 + 5.5 = 13.0).

full.label: npm run test:v2 (tier1 + tier2, single uncontended run)
full.note: ≤180 s wall (≤3 min), ≤13 CPU-min; CPU measured from the whole process tree, not derived from tier sums

concurrency.note: 5 concurrent test:v2 runs × 3 reps: 15/15 green, each run wall ≤ full.maxWallMs × 1.25 under mutual load, ledger keeps sum(workerSlots) ≤ cores
